title: Replace anchor link text with 'Details' in footer section

requirements.summary: Update the second anchor link text in the footer's second navigation column to display 'Details'
acceptanceCriteria: The second anchor link in the referenced footer navigation column displays the text 'Details' instead of its previous label.
The link's href and styling remain unchanged.
No other footer links or elements are affected.

file_operations.description: Locate the second anchor element within the second column of the footer navigation structure and replace its text content with 'Details'. Preserve the href attribute, className, and all other properties of the anchor element. Ensure no other elements in the footer are modified.
